creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 247810
gstreamer plugins

Add the gstreamer plugins that Clementine used to use.  Not sure if this is the ideal set but offered as a starting point.

Without this strawberry does not install the necessary gstreamer plugins on my system and is unable to play audio.  Not sure what used to pull down the deps because it worked for a while but no longer does on a fresh build.
